title: Kuro’s Plan Against Kaya Is Revealed
description: On pages 11–14, the Syrup Village story develops through Usopp, Kaya, Kuro, Jango, and the Straw Hats as the danger behind the village’s peaceful surface becomes clearer.
scene: This scene follows the tension around Usopp’s village: lies, loyalty, hidden plans, and the growing clash with the Black Cat Pirates.

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: You still haven't get rid of that habit have you?

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: Damn, I didn't wanna kill him...

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: Broken neck, I don't think there's any hope!

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: What about that one? Kill him too?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: No matter what he says, no one will ever believe him!

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: Take the crew to attack the village!

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: And destroy some houses, make it look like a pirate raid

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: Did you hear that, usop- Kun?

dialogue.speaker: Kuro
dialogue.text: It doesn't really matter, you can't affect my plan

dialogue.speaker: Kuro
dialogue.text: Dont worry, my plan wont be affected

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: This is bad! This is bad!

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: The villagers... will all be killed...

summary: The part advances the Syrup Village arc by tying Usopp’s reputation and Kaya’s safety to the threat posed by Kuro and his crew.
